description: You are a records manager overseeing document repository integration following the merger of two corporate divisions. Consolidate the 'Alpha Division' and 'Beta Division' workspaces into a new unified hierarchy as specified in the 'Merger Integration Plan' note found in the Workspaces area. Move or recreate all documents into the new structure, ensuring all have consistent metadata with descriptions of at least 20 characters. Create a new user group named 'integrated-team' containing all members from the 'alpha-team' and 'beta-team' groups, and grant this new group ReadWrite access to the consolidated workspace. Login credentials: Administrator / Administrator.
